Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Architects]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Architects do not allow Soulbound to keep their powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Jarelys Teach is acquainted with two of the three currently ruling Architects in the Consultant’s Guild.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Architects are the ruling council of the Consultant’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Meia tends to elevate the will of the Architects to the level of an Imperial mandate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Architects have alcoves with stone benches built into the wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Shera considers killing Architects to free Lucan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — The Architects rule the Gray Island and their students are kept separate from other orders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Architects are located on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Architects are alchemically trained.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 9''' — The Architects have alchemists who are breeding spiders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Architects create bait using a mix of Reading and alchemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — A cluster of Architects surrounded Shera and Meia at Bastion's Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Architects are a group of people that include those who can Read.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Architects are making a box.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Under normal circumstances, the subject would have been inducted into the Architects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — The Architects have talented healers.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Architects can order Consultants to the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Meia has no information from the Architects regarding Calder personally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Architects might be brought to Calder's side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Meia mentions that she would have to report herself to the Architects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — The Architects are a group that Teach intends to force into surrender.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Architects design plans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — The Architects are advised to use alchemical charges against the Emperor's quarters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — The Architects are the group responsible for determining Shera's fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — The Architects are responsible for meeting regarding Shera's confinement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Architects were calculating the approach of the Navigator ships.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — The Architects believed the chosen alchemy was intended to restrain or immobilize powerful opponents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — The Architects are a group whose actions Lucan is investigating.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — The Architects have the power to grant or deny permission for certain actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Zhen threatened to have the Architects knock Lucan back down to a recruit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Architects have discussed options with Kerian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Architects plan and look for strategies and tools.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — The High Council consulted with other Architects, primarily Readers and those trained in history.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — The Architects are an organization that can find Zhen immobilized.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Readers are found among the Architects at Shera's meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Architects are a group that Readers report to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Architects grow more excited with every new person that comes out successfully Soulbound.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
